word: G3912 - παραφρονέω - paraphronéō - par-af-ron-eh'-o - As a fool

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: As a fool
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be beside oneself, out of one's senses, void of understanding, insane
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3844 and G5426; to misthink, that is, be insane (silly): - as a fool.
